sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Beneath the weight of my mistakes
My spirit bends but never breaks
The arrows of my shame pierce deep
While in the darkness here I weep

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: But even as I stumble now
Before Your throne I humbly bow

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lord, don't forsake me in my pain
When strength has left, let hope remain
Though friends stand distant, You are near
Your mercy draws me through my fear

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: My wounds are open to the bone
My guilt leaves me to walk alone
Those who once loved me turn away
While others plot throughout the day

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: But even as I stumble now
Before Your throne I humbly bow

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lord, don't forsake me in my pain
When strength has left, let hope remain
Though friends stand distant, You are near
Your mercy draws me through my fear

sections.label: Bridge
lines: I confess my every sin
Let Your healing now begin
Though darkness claims the evening sky
Your light will break as morning nears

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Lord, don't forsake me in my pain
When strength has left, let hope remain
Though friends stand distant, You are near
Your mercy draws me through my fear
Your love will conquer every fear
